RULING:
DEFENDANT THE GOODYEAR TIRE & RUBBER COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant The Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company's motion for summary judgment is denied and its alternate motion for summary judgment is denied as to issue 1 (loss of consortium) and off calendar as to issue 2 (punitive damages). As to summary judgment, Mr. Warner's deposition testimony and declaration and the deposition testimony of Mr. DeMarse create a triable issue whether Mr. Warner was exposed to asbestos-containing products or materials (Goodyearite sheet gasket material) attributable to defendant. Summary adjudication of Mrs. Warner's cause of action for loss of consortium is denied because Mr. and Mrs. Warner were married at the time of diagnosis. (Vanhooser v. Superior Court (2012) 206 Cal.App.4th 921.) Plaintiffs have dismissed their claim for punitive damages. Defendant's objections to Mr. Warner's declaration are overruled. Order signed in open court.
